meaning: United States Tariff Commission 美国关税委员会
examples: Based on cyclic diagonal codes, an improved design of unitary space-time codes (USTC) at low SNR is proposed.
In 2000, Beijing authority invites and receives USTC Alumni Delegation who comes to study and exchange with Beijing counterparts.
Analysis was made for smoke filling process in large space building, and some full scale pool fire tests for comparison were made in USTC large space experimental hall.
